6616#~ "SET [ SESSION | LOCAL ] TIME ZONE { timezone | LOCAL | DEFAULT }"
6617
6618#~ msgid ""
6619#~ "[ WITH [ RECURSIVE ] with_query [, ...] ]\n"
6620#~ "SELECT [ ALL | DISTINCT [ ON ( expression [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6621#~ "    * | expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...]\n"
6622#~ "    INTO [ TEMPORARY | TEMP ] [ TABLE ] new_table\n"
6623#~ "    [ FROM from_item [, ...] ]\n"
6624#~ "    [ WHERE condition ]\n"
6625#~ "    [ GROUP BY expression [, ...] ]\n"
6626#~ "    [ HAVING condition [, ...] ]\n"
6627#~ "    [ WINDOW window_name AS ( window_definition ) [, ...] ]\n"
6628#~ "    [ { UNION | INTERSECT | EXCEPT } [ ALL ] select ]\n"
6629#~ "    [ ORDER BY expression [ ASC | DESC | USING operator ] [ NULLS { FIRST | LAST } ] [, ...] ]\n"
6630#~ "    [ LIMIT { count | ALL } ]\n"
6631#~ "    [ OFFSET start [ ROW | ROWS ] ]\n"
6632#~ "    [ FETCH { FIRST | NEXT } [ count ] { ROW | ROWS } ONLY ]\n"
6633#~ "    [ FOR { UPDATE | SHARE } [ OF table_name [, ...] ] [ NOWAIT ] [...] ]"
6634#~ msgstr ""
6635#~ "[ WITH [ RECURSIVE ] with_query [, ...] ]\n"
6636#~ "SELECT [ ALL | DISTINCT [ ON ( expression [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6637#~ "    * | expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...]\n"
6638#~ "    INTO [ TEMPORARY | TEMP ] [ TABLE ] new_table\n"
6639#~ "    [ FROM from_item [, ...] ]\n"
6640#~ "    [ WHERE condition ]\n"
6641#~ "    [ GROUP BY expression [, ...] ]\n"
6642#~ "    [ HAVING condition [, ...] ]\n"
6643#~ "    [ WINDOW window_name AS ( window_definition ) [, ...] ]\n"
6644#~ "    [ { UNION | INTERSECT | EXCEPT } [ ALL ] select ]\n"
6645#~ "    [ ORDER BY expression [ ASC | DESC | USING operator ] [ NULLS { FIRST | LAST } ] [, ...] ]\n"
6646#~ "    [ LIMIT { count | ALL } ]\n"
6647#~ "    [ OFFSET start [ ROW | ROWS ] ]\n"
6648#~ "    [ FETCH { FIRST | NEXT } [ count ] { ROW | ROWS } ONLY ]\n"
6649#~ "    [ FOR { UPDATE | SHARE } [ OF table_name [, ...] ] [ NOWAIT ] [...] ]"
6650
6651#~ msgid ""
6652#~ "[ WITH [ RECURSIVE ] with_query [, ...] ]\n"
6653#~ "SELECT [ ALL | DISTINCT [ ON ( expression [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6654#~ "    * | expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...]\n"
6655#~ "    [ FROM from_item [, ...] ]\n"
6656#~ "    [ WHERE condition ]\n"
6657#~ "    [ GROUP BY expression [, ...] ]\n"
6658#~ "    [ HAVING condition [, ...] ]\n"
6659#~ "    [ WINDOW window_name AS ( window_definition ) [, ...] ]\n"
6660#~ "    [ { UNION | INTERSECT | EXCEPT } [ ALL ] select ]\n"
6661#~ "    [ ORDER BY expression [ ASC | DESC | USING operator ] [ NULLS { FIRST | LAST } ] [, ...] ]\n"
6662#~ "    [ LIMIT { count | ALL } ]\n"
6663#~ "    [ OFFSET start [ ROW | ROWS ] ]\n"
6664#~ "    [ FETCH { FIRST | NEXT } [ count ] { ROW | ROWS } ONLY ]\n"
6665#~ "    [ FOR { UPDATE | SHARE } [ OF table_name [, ...] ] [ NOWAIT ] [...] ]\n"
6666#~ "\n"
6667#~ "where from_item can be one of:\n"
6668#~ "\n"
6669#~ "    [ ONLY ] table_name [ * ] [ [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6670#~ "    ( select ) [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ]\n"
6671#~ "    with_query_name [ [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6672#~ "    function_name ( [ argument [, ...] ] ) [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] | column_definition [, ...] ) ]\n"
6673#~ "    function_name ( [ argument [, ...] ] ) AS ( column_definition [, ...] )\n"
6674#~ "    from_item [ NATURAL ] join_type from_item [ ON join_condition | USING ( join_column [, ...] ) ]\n"
6675#~ "\n"
6676#~ "and with_query is:\n"
6677#~ "\n"
6678#~ "    with_query_name [ ( column_name [, ...] ) ] AS ( select )\n"
6679#~ "\n"
6680#~ "TABLE { [ ONLY ] table_name [ * ] | with_query_name }"
6681#~ msgstr ""
6682#~ "[ WITH [ RECURSIVE ] with_query [, ...] ]\n"
6683#~ "SELECT [ ALL | DISTINCT [ ON ( expression [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6684#~ "    * | expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...]\n"
6685#~ "    [ FROM from_item [, ...] ]\n"
6686#~ "    [ WHERE condition ]\n"
6687#~ "    [ GROUP BY expression [, ...] ]\n"
6688#~ "    [ HAVING condition [, ...] ]\n"
6689#~ "    [ WINDOW window_name AS ( window_definition ) [, ...] ]\n"
6690#~ "    [ { UNION | INTERSECT | EXCEPT } [ ALL ] select ]\n"
6691#~ "    [ ORDER BY expression [ ASC | DESC | USING operator ] [ NULLS { FIRST | LAST } ] [, ...] ]\n"
6692#~ "    [ LIMIT { count | ALL } ]\n"
6693#~ "    [ OFFSET start [ ROW | ROWS ] ]\n"
6694#~ "    [ FETCH { FIRST | NEXT } [ count ] { ROW | ROWS } ONLY ]\n"
6695#~ "    [ FOR { UPDATE | SHARE } [ OF table_name [, ...] ] [ NOWAIT ] [...] ]\n"
6696#~ "\n"
6697#~ "where from_item can be one of:\n"
6698#~ "\n"
6699#~ "    [ ONLY ] table_name [ * ] [ [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6700#~ "    ( select ) [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ]\n"
6701#~ "    with_query_name [ [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] ) ] ]\n"
6702#~ "    function_name ( [ argument [, ...] ] ) [ AS ] alias [ ( column_alias [, ...] | column_definition [, ...] ) ]\n"
6703#~ "    function_name ( [ argument [, ...] ] ) AS ( column_definition [, ...] )\n"
6704#~ "    from_item [ NATURAL ] join_type from_item [ ON join_condition | USING ( join_column [, ...] ) ]\n"
6705#~ "\n"
6706#~ "and with_query is:\n"
6707#~ "\n"
6708#~ "    with_query_name [ ( column_name [, ...] ) ] AS ( select )\n"
6709#~ "\n"
6710#~ "TABLE { [ ONLY ] table_name [ * ] | with_query_name }"
6711
6712#~ msgid "ROLLBACK [ WORK | TRANSACTION ] TO [ SAVEPOINT ] savepoint_name"
6713#~ msgstr "ROLLBACK [ WORK | TRANSACTION ] TO [ SAVEPOINT ] savepoint_adı"
6714
6715#~ msgid "ROLLBACK PREPARED transaction_id"
6716#~ msgstr "ROLLBACK PREPARED transaction_id"
6717
6718#~ msgid "ROLLBACK [ WORK | TRANSACTION ]"
6719#~ msgstr "ROLLBACK [ WORK | TRANSACTION ]"
6720
6721#~ msgid ""
6722#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6723#~ "    { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE | TRUNCATE | REFERENCES | TRIGGER }\n"
6724#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6725#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablename [, ...]\n"
6726#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6727#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6728#~ "\n"
6729#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6730#~ "    { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | REFERENCES } ( column [, ...] )\n"
6731#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] ( column [, ...] ) }\n"
6732#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablename [, ...]\n"
6733#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6734#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6735#~ "\n"
6736#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6737#~ "    { { USAGE | SELECT | UPDATE }\n"
6738#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6739#~ "    ON SEQUENCE sequencename [, ...]\n"
6740#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6741#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6742#~ "\n"
6743#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6744#~ "    { { CREATE | CONNECT | TEMPORARY | TEMP } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6745#~ "    ON DATABASE dbname [, ...]\n"
6746#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6747#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6748#~ "\n"
6749#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6750#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6751#~ "    ON FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER fdwname [, ...]\n"
6752#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6753#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6754#~ "\n"
6755#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6756#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6757#~ "    ON FOREIGN SERVER servername [, ...]\n"
6758#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6759#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6760#~ "\n"
6761#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6762#~ "    { EXECUTE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6763#~ "    ON FUNCTION funcname ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] ) [, ...]\n"
6764#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6765#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6766#~ "\n"
6767#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6768#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6769#~ "    ON LANGUAGE langname [, ...]\n"
6770#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6771#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6772#~ "\n"
6773#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6774#~ "    { { CREATE | USAGE } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6775#~ "    ON SCHEMA schemaname [, ...]\n"
6776#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6777#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6778#~ "\n"
6779#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6780#~ "    { CREATE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6781#~ "    ON TABLESPACE tablespacename [, ...]\n"
6782#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6783#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6784#~ "\n"
6785#~ "REVOKE [ ADMIN OPTION FOR ]\n"
6786#~ "    role [, ...] FROM rolename [, ...]\n"
6787#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]"
6788#~ msgstr ""
6789#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6790#~ "    { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE | TRUNCATE | REFERENCES | TRIGGER }\n"
6791#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6792#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablo adı [, ...]\n"
6793#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6794#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6795#~ "\n"
6796#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6797#~ "    { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | REFERENCES } ( kolon [, ...] )\n"
6798#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] ( kolon [, ...] ) }\n"
6799#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablo adı [, ...]\n"
6800#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6801#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6802#~ "\n"
6803#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6804#~ "    { { USAGE | SELECT | UPDATE }\n"
6805#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6806#~ "    ON SEQUENCE sequence adı [, ...]\n"
6807#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6808#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6809#~ "\n"
6810#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6811#~ "    { { CREATE | CONNECT | TEMPORARY | TEMP } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6812#~ "    ON DATABASE veritabanı adı [, ...]\n"
6813#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6814#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6815#~ "\n"
6816#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6817#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6818#~ "    ON FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER fdw adı [, ...]\n"
6819#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı  | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6820#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6821#~ "\n"
6822#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6823#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6824#~ "    ON FOREIGN SERVER sunucu adu [, ...]\n"
6825#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6826#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6827#~ "\n"
6828#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6829#~ "    { EXECUTE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6830#~ "    ON FUNCTION fonksiyon adı ( [ [ argüman modu ] [ argüman adı ] argüman tipi [, ...] ] ) [, ...]\n"
6831#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6832#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6833#~ "\n"
6834#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6835#~ "    { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6836#~ "    ON LANGUAGE dil adı [, ...]\n"
6837#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6838#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6839#~ "\n"
6840#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6841#~ "    { { CREATE | USAGE } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6842#~ "    ON SCHEMA şema adı [, ...]\n"
6843#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6844#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6845#~ "\n"
6846#~ "REVOKE [ GRANT OPTION FOR ]\n"
6847#~ "    { CREATE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6848#~ "    ON TABLESPACE tablespace adı [, ...]\n"
6849#~ "    FROM { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...]\n"
6850#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]\n"
6851#~ "\n"
6852#~ "REVOKE [ ADMIN OPTION FOR ]\n"
6853#~ "    role [, ...] FROM rol adı [, ...]\n"
6854#~ "    [ CASCADE | RESTRICT ]"
6855

6877#~ msgid ""
6878#~ "LOCK [ TABLE ] [ ONLY ] name [, ...] [ IN lockmode MODE ] [ NOWAIT ]\n"
6879#~ "\n"
6880#~ "where lockmode is one of:\n"
6881#~ "\n"
6882#~ "    ACCESS SHARE | ROW SHARE | ROW EXCLUSIVE | SHARE UPDATE EXCLUSIVE\n"
6883#~ "    | SHARE | SHARE ROW EXCLUSIVE | EXCLUSIVE | ACCESS EXCLUSIVE"
6884#~ msgstr ""
6885#~ "LOCK [ TABLE ] [ ONLY ] ad [, ...] [ IN kilit modu MODE ] [ NOWAIT ]\n"
6886#~ "\n"
6887#~ "kilit modu aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
6888#~ "\n"
6889#~ "    ACCESS SHARE | ROW SHARE | ROW EXCLUSIVE | SHARE UPDATE EXCLUSIVE\n"
6890#~ "    | SHARE | SHARE ROW EXCLUSIVE | EXCLUSIVE | ACCESS EXCLUSIVE"

6900#~ "    { DEFAULT VALUES | VALUES ( { expression | DEFAULT } [, ...] ) [, ...] | query }\n"
6901#~ "    [ RETURNING * | output_expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...] ]"
6902#~ msgstr ""

6905#~ "    [ RETURNING * | output_expression [ [ AS ] output_name ] [, ...] ]"

6907#~ msgid ""
6908#~ "GRANT { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE | TRUNCATE | REFERENCES | TRIGGER }\n"
6909#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6910#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablename [, ...]\n"
6911#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6912#~ "\n"
6913#~ "GRANT { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | REFERENCES } ( column [, ...] )\n"
6914#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] ( column [, ...] ) }\n"
6915#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablename [, ...]\n"
6916#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6917#~ "\n"
6918#~ "GRANT { { USAGE | SELECT | UPDATE }\n"
6919#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6920#~ "    ON SEQUENCE sequencename [, ...]\n"
6921#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6922#~ "\n"
6923#~ "GRANT { { CREATE | CONNECT | TEMPORARY | TEMP } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6924#~ "    ON DATABASE dbname [, ...]\n"
6925#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6926#~ "\n"
6927#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6928#~ "    ON FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER fdwname [, ...]\n"
6929#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6930#~ "\n"
6931#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6932#~ "    ON FOREIGN SERVER servername [, ...]\n"
6933#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6934#~ "\n"
6935#~ "GRANT { EXECUTE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6936#~ "    ON FUNCTION funcname ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] ) [, ...]\n"
6937#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6938#~ "\n"
6939#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6940#~ "    ON LANGUAGE langname [, ...]\n"
6941#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6942#~ "\n"
6943#~ "GRANT { { CREATE | USAGE } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6944#~ "    ON SCHEMA schemaname [, ...]\n"
6945#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6946#~ "\n"
6947#~ "GRANT { CREATE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6948#~ "    ON TABLESPACE tablespacename [, ...]\n"
6949#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6950#~ "\n"
6951#~ "GRANT role [, ...] TO rolename [, ...] [ WITH ADMIN OPTION ]"
6952#~ msgstr ""
6953#~ "GRANT { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE | TRUNCATE | REFERENCES | TRIGGER }\n"
6954#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6955#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablo adı [, ...]\n"
6956#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6957#~ "\n"
6958#~ "GRANT { { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | REFERENCES } ( kolon [, ...] )\n"
6959#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] ( kolon [, ...] ) }\n"
6960#~ "    ON [ TABLE ] tablo adı [, ...]\n"
6961#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6962#~ "\n"
6963#~ "GRANT { { USAGE | SELECT | UPDATE }\n"
6964#~ "    [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6965#~ "    ON SEQUENCE sequence adı [, ...]\n"
6966#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rolename | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6967#~ "\n"
6968#~ "GRANT { { CREATE | CONNECT | TEMPORARY | TEMP } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6969#~ "    ON DATABASE veritabanı adı [, ...]\n"
6970#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6971#~ "\n"
6972#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6973#~ "    ON FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER fdw adı [, ...]\n"
6974#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6975#~ "\n"
6976#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6977#~ "    ON FOREIGN SERVER sunucu adı [, ...]\n"
6978#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6979#~ "\n"
6980#~ "GRANT { EXECUTE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6981#~ "    ON FUNCTION fonksiyon adı ( [ [ argüman modu ] [ argüman adı ] argüman tipi [, ...] ] ) [, ...]\n"
6982#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6983#~ "\n"
6984#~ "GRANT { USAGE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6985#~ "    ON LANGUAGE dil adı [, ...]\n"
6986#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6987#~ "\n"
6988#~ "GRANT { { CREATE | USAGE } [,...] | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6989#~ "    ON SCHEMA şema adı [, ...]\n"
6990#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6991#~ "\n"
6992#~ "GRANT { CREATE | ALL [ PRIVILEGES ] }\n"
6993#~ "    ON TABLESPACE tablespacename [, ...]\n"
6994#~ "    TO { [ GROUP ] rol adı | PUBLIC } [, ...] [ WITH GRANT OPTION ]\n"
6995#~ "\n"
6996#~ "GRANT role [, ...] TO rol adı [, ...] [ WITH ADMIN OPTION ]"
6997
6998#~ msgid ""
6999#~ "FETCH [ direction { FROM | IN } ] cursorname\n"
7000#~ "\n"
7001#~ "where direction can be empty or one of:\n"
7002#~ "\n"
7003#~ "    NEXT\n"
7004#~ "    PRIOR\n"
7005#~ "    FIRST\n"
7006#~ "    LAST\n"
7007#~ "    ABSOLUTE count\n"
7008#~ "    RELATIVE count\n"
7009#~ "    count\n"
7010#~ "    ALL\n"
7011#~ "    FORWARD\n"
7012#~ "    FORWARD count\n"
7013#~ "    FORWARD ALL\n"
7014#~ "    BACKWARD\n"
7015#~ "    BACKWARD count\n"
7016#~ "    BACKWARD ALL"
7017#~ msgstr ""
7018#~ "FETCH [ direction { FROM | IN } ] cursorname\n"
7019#~ "\n"
7020#~ "direction boş ya da aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7021#~ "\n"
7022#~ "    NEXT\n"
7023#~ "    PRIOR\n"
7024#~ "    FIRST\n"
7025#~ "    LAST\n"
7026#~ "    ABSOLUTE count\n"
7027#~ "    RELATIVE count\n"
7028#~ "    count\n"
7029#~ "    ALL\n"
7030#~ "    FORWARD\n"
7031#~ "    FORWARD count\n"
7032#~ "    FORWARD ALL\n"
7033#~ "    BACKWARD\n"
7034#~ "    BACKWARD count\n"
7035#~ "    BACKWARD ALL"

7171#~ msgid ""
7172#~ "CREATE USER MAPPING FOR { username | USER | CURRENT_USER | PUBLIC }\n"
7173#~ "    SERVER servername\n"
7174#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( option 'value' [ , ... ] ) ]"
7175#~ msgstr ""
7176#~ "CREATE USER MAPPING FOR { kullanıcı adı | USER | CURRENT_USER | PUBLIC }\n"
7177#~ "    SERVER sunucu adı\n"
7178#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( seçenek 'değer' [ , ... ] ) ]"
7179
7180#~ msgid ""
7181#~ "CREATE USER name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
7182#~ "\n"
7183#~ "where option can be:\n"
7184#~ "    \n"
7185#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7186#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7187#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7188#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7189#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7190#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7191#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
7192#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7193#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7194#~ "    | IN ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7195#~ "    | IN GROUP rolename [, ...]\n"
7196#~ "    | ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7197#~ "    | ADMIN rolename [, ...]\n"
7198#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"
7199#~ "    | SYSID uid"
7200#~ msgstr ""
7201#~ "CREATE USER name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
7202#~ "\n"
7203#~ "seçenek aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7204#~ "    \n"
7205#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7206#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7207#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7208#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7209#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7210#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7211#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
7212#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7213#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7214#~ "    | IN ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7215#~ "    | IN GROUP rolename [, ...]\n"
7216#~ "    | ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7217#~ "    | ADMIN rolename [, ...]\n"
7218#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"
7219#~ "    | SYSID uid"

7221#~ msgid ""
7222#~ "CREATE TYPE name AS\n"
7223#~ "    ( attribute_name data_type [, ... ] )\n"
7224#~ "\n"
7225#~ "CREATE TYPE name AS ENUM\n"
7226#~ "    ( 'label' [, ... ] )\n"
7227#~ "\n"
7228#~ "CREATE TYPE name (\n"
7229#~ "    INPUT = input_function,\n"
7230#~ "    OUTPUT = output_function\n"
7231#~ "    [ , RECEIVE = receive_function ]\n"
7232#~ "    [ , SEND = send_function ]\n"
7233#~ "    [ , TYPMOD_IN = type_modifier_input_function ]\n"
7234#~ "    [ , TYPMOD_OUT = type_modifier_output_function ]\n"
7235#~ "    [ , ANALYZE = analyze_function ]\n"
7236#~ "    [ , INTERNALLENGTH = { internallength | VARIABLE } ]\n"
7237#~ "    [ , PASSEDBYVALUE ]\n"
7238#~ "    [ , ALIGNMENT = alignment ]\n"
7239#~ "    [ , STORAGE = storage ]\n"
7240#~ "    [ , LIKE = like_type ]\n"
7241#~ "    [ , CATEGORY = category ]\n"
7242#~ "    [ , PREFERRED = preferred ]\n"
7243#~ "    [ , DEFAULT = default ]\n"
7244#~ "    [ , ELEMENT = element ]\n"
7245#~ "    [ , DELIMITER = delimiter ]\n"
7246#~ ")\n"
7247#~ "\n"
7248#~ "CREATE TYPE name"
7249#~ msgstr ""
7250#~ "CREATE TYPE ad AS\n"
7251#~ "    ( attribute_name veri tipi [, ... ] )\n"
7252#~ "\n"
7253#~ "CREATE TYPE ad AS ENUM\n"
7254#~ "    ( 'label' [, ... ] )\n"
7255#~ "\n"
7256#~ "CREATE TYPE ad (\n"
7257#~ "    INPUT = input_function,\n"
7258#~ "    OUTPUT = output_function\n"
7259#~ "    [ , RECEIVE = receive_function ]\n"
7260#~ "    [ , SEND = send_function ]\n"
7261#~ "    [ , TYPMOD_IN = type_modifier_input_function ]\n"
7262#~ "    [ , TYPMOD_OUT = type_modifier_output_function ]\n"
7263#~ "    [ , ANALYZE = analyze_function ]\n"
7264#~ "    [ , INTERNALLENGTH = { internallength | VARIABLE } ]\n"

7271#~ "    [ , DEFAULT = default ]\n"
7272#~ "    [ , ELEMENT = element ]\n"
7273#~ "    [ , DELIMITER = delimiter ]\n"
7274#~ ")\n"
7275#~ "\n"
7276#~ "CREATE TYPE name"

7340#~ msgid ""
7341#~ "CREATE [ [ GLOBAL | LOCAL ] { TEMPORARY | TEMP } ] TABLE table_name\n"
7342#~ "    [ (column_name [, ...] ) ]\n"
7343#~ "    [ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) | WITH OIDS | WITHOUT OIDS ]\n"
7344#~ "    [ ON COMMIT { PRESERVE ROWS | DELETE ROWS | DROP } ]\n"
7345#~ "    [ TABLESPACE tablespace ]\n"
7346#~ "    AS query\n"
7347#~ "    [ WITH [ NO ] DATA ]"
7348#~ msgstr ""
7349#~ "CREATE [ [ GLOBAL | LOCAL ] { TEMPORARY | TEMP } ] TABLE tablo adı\n"
7350#~ "    [ (kolon adı [, ...] ) ]\n"
7351#~ "    [ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) | WITH OIDS | WITHOUT OIDS ]\n"
7352#~ "    [ ON COMMIT { PRESERVE ROWS | DELETE ROWS | DROP } ]\n"
7353#~ "    [ TABLESPACE tablespace ]\n"
7354#~ "    AS sorgu\n"
7355#~ "    [ WITH [ NO ] DATA ]"
7356
7357#~ msgid ""
7358#~ "CREATE [ [ GLOBAL | LOCAL ] { TEMPORARY | TEMP } ] TABLE table_name ( [\n"
7359#~ "  { column_name data_type [ DEFAULT default_expr ] [ column_constraint [ ... ] ]\n"
7360#~ "    | table_constraint\n"
7361#~ "    | LIKE parent_table [ { INCLUDING | EXCLUDING } { DEFAULTS | CONSTRAINTS | INDEXES } ] ... }\n"
7362#~ "    [, ... ]\n"
7363#~ "] )\n"
7364#~ "[ INHERITS ( parent_table [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7365#~ "[ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) | WITH OIDS | WITHOUT OIDS ]\n"
7366#~ "[ ON COMMIT { PRESERVE ROWS | DELETE ROWS | DROP } ]\n"
7367#~ "[ TABLESPACE tablespace ]\n"
7368#~ "\n"
7369#~ "where column_constraint is:\n"
7370#~ "\n"
7371#~ "[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7372#~ "{ NOT NULL | \n"
7373#~ "  NULL | \n"
7374#~ "  UNIQUE index_parameters |\n"
7375#~ "  PRIMARY KEY index_parameters |\n"
7376#~ "  CHECK ( expression ) |\n"
7377#~ "  REFERENCES reftable [ ( refcolumn ) ] [ MATCH FULL | MATCH PARTIAL | MATCH SIMPLE ]\n"
7378#~ "    [ ON DELETE action ] [ ON UPDATE action ] }\n"
7379#~ "[ DEFERRABLE | NOT DEFERRABLE ] [ INITIALLY DEFERRED | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE ]\n"
7380#~ "\n"
7381#~ "and table_constraint is:\n"
7382#~ "\n"
7383#~ "[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7384#~ "{ UNIQUE ( column_name [, ... ] ) index_parameters |\n"
7385#~ "  PRIMARY KEY ( column_name [, ... ] ) index_parameters |\n"
7386#~ "  CHECK ( expression ) |\n"
7387#~ "  FOREIGN KEY ( column_name [, ... ] ) REFERENCES reftable [ ( refcolumn [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7388#~ "    [ MATCH FULL | MATCH PARTIAL | MATCH SIMPLE ] [ ON DELETE action ] [ ON UPDATE action ] }\n"
7389#~ "[ DEFERRABLE | NOT DEFERRABLE ] [ INITIALLY DEFERRED | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE ]\n"
7390#~ "\n"
7391#~ "index_parameters in UNIQUE and PRIMARY KEY constraints are:\n"
7392#~ "\n"
7393#~ "[ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7394#~ "[ USING INDEX TABLESPACE tablespace ]"
7395#~ msgstr ""
7396#~ "CREATE [ [ GLOBAL | LOCAL ] { TEMPORARY | TEMP } ] TABLE tablo_adı ( [\n"
7397#~ "  { kolon_adı veri_tipi [ DEFAULT default_expr ] [ kolon_kısıtlayıcısı [ ... ] ]\n"
7398#~ "    | tablo_kısıtlayıcısı\n"
7399#~ "    | LIKE parent_table [ { INCLUDING | EXCLUDING } { DEFAULTS | CONSTRAINTS | INDEXES } ] ... }\n"
7400#~ "    [, ... ]\n"
7401#~ "] )\n"
7402#~ "[ INHERITS ( parent_table [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7403#~ "[ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) | WITH OIDS | WITHOUT OIDS ]\n"
7404#~ "[ ON COMMIT { PRESERVE ROWS | DELETE ROWS | DROP } ]\n"
7405#~ "[ TABLESPACE tablo_uzayı ]\n"
7406#~ "\n"
7407#~ "kolon_kısıtlayıcısı aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7408#~ "\n"
7409#~ "im[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7410#~ "{ NOT NULL | \n"
7411#~ "  NULL | \n"
7412#~ "  UNIQUE index_parametreleri |\n"
7413#~ "  PRIMARY KEY index_parametreleri |\n"
7414#~ "  CHECK ( ifade ) |\n"
7415#~ "  REFERENCES referans_tablosu [ ( referans_kolonu ) ] [ MATCH FULL | MATCH PARTIAL | MATCH SIMPLE ]\n"
7416#~ "    [ ON DELETE işlem ] [ ON UPDATE işlem ] }\n"
7417#~ "[ DEFERRABLE | NOT DEFERRABLE ] [ INITIALLY DEFERRED | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE ]\n"
7418#~ "\n"
7419#~ "ve tablo_kısıtlayıcısı aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7420#~ "\n"
7421#~ "[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7422#~ "{ UNIQUE ( column_name [, ... ] ) index_parameters |\n"
7423#~ "  PRIMARY KEY ( column_name [, ... ] ) index_parameters |\n"
7424#~ "  CHECK ( expression ) |\n"
7425#~ "  FOREIGN KEY ( column_name [, ... ] ) REFERENCES reftable [ ( refcolumn [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7426#~ "    [ MATCH FULL | MATCH PARTIAL | MATCH SIMPLE ] [ ON DELETE action ] [ ON UPDATE action ] }\n"
7427#~ "[ DEFERRABLE | NOT DEFERRABLE ] [ INITIALLY DEFERRED | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE ]\n"
7428#~ "\n"
7429#~ "UNIQUE ve PRIMARY KEY kısıtlamalarındaki index parametreleri aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7430#~ "\n"
7431#~ "[ WITH ( storage_parameter [= value] [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7432#~ "[ USING INDEX TABLESPACE tablo_uzayı ]"
7433
7434#~ msgid ""
7435#~ "CREATE SERVER servername [ TYPE 'servertype' ] [ VERSION 'serverversion' ]\n"

7437#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( option 'value' [, ... ] ) ]"

7440#~ "    FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER fdw adı\n"
7441#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( seçenek 'değer' [, ... ] ) ]"
7442
7443#~ msgid ""

7446#~ "    [ START [ WITH ] start ] [ CACHE cache ] [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]\n"
7447#~ "    [ OWNED BY { table.column | NONE } ]"
7448#~ msgstr ""
7449#~ "CREATE [ TEMPORARY | TEMP ] SEQUENCE name [ INCREMENT [ BY ] increment ]\n"
7450#~ "    [ MINVALUE minvalue | NO MINVALUE ] [ MAXVALUE maxvalue | NO MAXVALUE ]\n"
7451#~ "    [ START [ WITH ] start ] [ CACHE cache ] [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]\n"
7452#~ "    [ OWNED BY { table.column | NONE } ]"

7470#~ msgid ""
7471#~ "CREATE ROLE name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
7472#~ "\n"
7473#~ "where option can be:\n"
7474#~ "    \n"
7475#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7476#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7477#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7478#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7479#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7480#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7481#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
7482#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7483#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7484#~ "    | IN ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7485#~ "    | IN GROUP rolename [, ...]\n"
7486#~ "    | ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7487#~ "    | ADMIN rolename [, ...]\n"
7488#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"
7489#~ "    | SYSID uid"
7490#~ msgstr ""
7491#~ "CREATE ROLE name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
7492#~ "\n"
7493#~ "seçenek aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7494#~ "    \n"
7495#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7496#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7497#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7498#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7499#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7500#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7501#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
7502#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7503#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7504#~ "    | IN ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7505#~ "    | IN GROUP rolename [, ...]\n"
7506#~ "    | ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"
7507#~ "    | ADMIN rolename [, ...]\n"
7508#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"
7509#~ "    | SYSID uid"

7511#~ msgid "CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method"
7512#~ msgstr "CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method"
7513
7514#~ msgid ""
7515#~ "CREATE OPERATOR CLASS name [ DEFAULT ] FOR TYPE data_type\n"
7516#~ "  USING index_method [ FAMILY family_name ] AS\n"
7517#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number operator_name [ ( op_type, op_type ) ]\n"
7518#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number [ ( op_type [ , op_type ] ) ] funcname ( argument_type [, ...] )\n"
7519#~ "   | STORAGE storage_type\n"
7520#~ "  } [, ... ]"
7521#~ msgstr ""
7522#~ "CREATE OPERATOR CLASS ad [ DEFAULT ] FOR TYPE veri tipi\n"
7523#~ "  USING index metodu [ FAMILY family_name ] AS\n"
7524#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number operatör adı [ ( op_type, op_type ) ]\n"
7525#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number [ ( op_type [ , op_type ] ) ] fonksiyon adı ( argument_type [, ...] )\n"
7526#~ "   | STORAGE storage_type\n"
7527#~ "  } [, ... ]"
7528
7529#~ msgid ""
7530#~ "CREATE OPERATOR name (\n"
7531#~ "    PROCEDURE = funcname\n"
7532#~ "    [, LEFTARG = lefttype ] [, RIGHTARG = righttype ]\n"
7533#~ "    [, COMMUTATOR = com_op ] [, NEGATOR = neg_op ]\n"
7534#~ "    [, RESTRICT = res_proc ] [, JOIN = join_proc ]\n"
7535#~ "    [, HASHES ] [, MERGES ]\n"
7536#~ ")"
7537#~ msgstr ""

7539#~ "    PROCEDURE = funcname\n"
7540#~ "    [, LEFTARG = lefttype ] [, RIGHTARG = righttype ]\n"
7541#~ "    [, COMMUTATOR = com_op ] [, NEGATOR = neg_op ]\n"
7542#~ "    [, RESTRICT = res_proc ] [, JOIN = join_proc ]\n"
7543#~ "    [, HASHES ] [, MERGES ]\n"
7544#~ ")"

7558#~ "    [ WITH ( storage_parameter = value [, ... ] ) ]\n"
7559#~ "    [ TABLESPACE tablespace ]\n"
7560#~ "    [ WHERE predicate ]"

7578#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"

7583#~ "    | ROLE rolename [, ...]\n"

7585#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"
7586#~ "    | SYSID uid"
7587#~ msgstr ""
7588#~ "CREATE GROUP name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"

7601#~ "    | IN GROUP rolename [, ...]\n"

7604#~ "    | USER rolename [, ...]\n"

7606
7607#~ msgid ""
7608#~ "CREATE [ OR REPLACE ] FUNCTION\n"
7609#~ "    name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [ { DEFAULT | = } defexpr ] [, ...] ] )\n"
7610#~ "    [ RETURNS rettype\n"
7611#~ "      | RETURNS TABLE ( colname coltype [, ...] ) ]\n"
7612#~ "  { LANGUAGE langname\n"
7613#~ "    | WINDOW\n"
7614#~ "    | IMMUTABLE | STABLE | VOLATILE\n"
7615#~ "    | CALLED ON NULL INPUT | RETURNS NULL ON NULL INPUT | STRICT\n"
7616#~ "    | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY INVOKER | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY DEFINER\n"
7617#~ "    | COST execution_cost\n"
7618#~ "    | ROWS result_rows\n"
7619#~ "    | SET configuration_parameter { TO value | = value | FROM CURRENT }\n"
7620#~ "    | AS 'definition'\n"
7621#~ "    | AS 'obj_file', 'link_symbol'\n"
7622#~ "  } ...\n"
7623#~ "    [ WITH ( attribute [, ...] ) ]"
7624#~ msgstr ""
7625#~ "CREATE [ OR REPLACE ] FUNCTION\n"
7626#~ "    ad ( [ [ argüman modu ] [ argüman adı ] argüman tipi [ { DEFAULT | = } defexpr ] [, ...] ] )\n"
7627#~ "    [ RETURNS rettype\n"
7628#~ "      | RETURNS TABLE ( kolon_adı kolon_tipi [, ...] ) ]\n"
7629#~ "  { LANGUAGE dil adı\n"
7630#~ "    | WINDOW\n"
7631#~ "    | IMMUTABLE | STABLE | VOLATILE\n"
7632#~ "    | CALLED ON NULL INPUT | RETURNS NULL ON NULL INPUT | STRICT\n"
7633#~ "    | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY INVOKER | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY DEFINER\n"
7634#~ "    | COST execution_cost\n"
7635#~ "    | ROWS result_rows\n"
7636#~ "    | SET yapılandırma parametresi { TO değer | = değer | FROM CURRENT }\n"
7637#~ "    | AS 'tanım'\n"
7638#~ "    | AS 'obj_file', 'link_symbol'\n"
7639#~ "  } ...\n"
7640#~ "    [ WITH ( attribute [, ...] ) ]"
7641
7642#~ msgid ""
7643#~ "CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER name\n"
7644#~ "    [ VALIDATOR valfunction | NO VALIDATOR ]\n"
7645#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( option 'value' [, ... ] ) ]"
7646#~ msgstr ""

7648#~ "    [ VALIDATOR valfunction | NO VALIDATOR ]\n"
7649#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( option 'value' [, ... ] ) ]"

7651#~ msgid ""
7652#~ "CREATE DOMAIN name [ AS ] data_type\n"
7653#~ "    [ DEFAULT expression ]\n"
7654#~ "    [ constraint [ ... ] ]\n"
7655#~ "\n"
7656#~ "where constraint is:\n"
7657#~ "\n"
7658#~ "[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7659#~ "{ NOT NULL | NULL | CHECK (expression) }"
7660#~ msgstr ""
7661#~ "CREATE DOMAIN name [ AS ] data_type\n"
7662#~ "    [ DEFAULT expression ]\n"
7663#~ "    [ constraint [ ... ] ]\n"
7664#~ "\n"
7665#~ "constraint aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7666#~ "\n"
7667#~ "[ CONSTRAINT constraint_name ]\n"
7668#~ "{ NOT NULL | NULL | CHECK (expression) }"
7669
7670#~ msgid ""
7671#~ "CREATE DATABASE name\n"
7672#~ "    [ [ WITH ] [ OWNER [=] dbowner ]\n"
7673#~ "           [ TEMPLATE [=] template ]\n"
7674#~ "           [ ENCODING [=] encoding ]\n"
7675#~ "           [ LC_COLLATE [=] lc_collate ]\n"
7676#~ "           [ LC_CTYPE [=] lc_ctype ]\n"
7677#~ "           [ TABLESPACE [=] tablespace ]\n"
7678#~ "           [ CONNECTION LIMIT [=] connlimit ] ]"
7679#~ msgstr ""
7680#~ "CREATE DATABASE ad\n"
7681#~ "    [ [ WITH ] [ OWNER [=] veritabanı sahibi ]\n"
7682#~ "           [ TEMPLATE [=] şablon ]\n"
7683#~ "           [ ENCODING [=] dil kodlaması ]\n"
7684#~ "           [ LC_COLLATE [=] lc_collate ]\n"
7685#~ "           [ LC_CTYPE [=] lc_ctype ]\n"
7686#~ "           [ TABLESPACE [=] tablespace ]\n"
7687#~ "           [ CONNECTION LIMIT [=] bağlantı sınırı ] ]"

7689#~ msgid ""
7690#~ "CREATE [ DEFAULT ] CONVERSION name\n"
7691#~ "    FOR source_encoding TO dest_encoding FROM funcname"
7692#~ msgstr ""
7693#~ "CREATE [ DEFAULT ] CONVERSION name\n"
7694#~ "    FOR source_encoding TO dest_encoding FROM funcname"
7695
7696#~ msgid ""
7697#~ "CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER name\n"
7698#~ "    AFTER event [ OR ... ]\n"
7699#~ "    ON table_name\n"
7700#~ "    [ FROM referenced_table_name ]\n"
7701#~ "    { NOT DEFERRABLE | [ DEFERRABLE ] { INITIALLY IMMEDIATE | INITIALLY DEFERRED } }\n"
7702#~ "    FOR EACH ROW\n"
7703#~ "    EXECUTE PROCEDURE funcname ( arguments )"
7704#~ msgstr ""
7705#~ "CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER name\n"
7706#~ "    AFTER event [ OR ... ]\n"
7707#~ "    ON table_name\n"
7708#~ "    [ FROM referenced_table_name ]\n"
7709#~ "    { NOT DEFERRABLE | [ DEFERRABLE ] { INITIALLY IMMEDIATE | INITIALLY DEFERRED } }\n"
7710#~ "    FOR EACH ROW\n"
7711#~ "    EXECUTE PROCEDURE funcname ( arguments )"
7712
7713#~ msgid ""
7714#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7715#~ "    WITH FUNCTION funcname (argtypes)\n"
7716#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]\n"
7717#~ "\n"
7718#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7719#~ "    WITHOUT FUNCTION\n"
7720#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]\n"
7721#~ "\n"
7722#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7723#~ "    WITH INOUT\n"
7724#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]"
7725#~ msgstr ""
7726#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7727#~ "    WITH FUNCTION funcname (argtypes)\n"
7728#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]\n"
7729#~ "\n"
7730#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7731#~ "    WITHOUT FUNCTION\n"
7732#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]\n"
7733#~ "\n"
7734#~ "CREATE CAST (sourcetype AS targettype)\n"
7735#~ "    WITH INOUT\n"
7736#~ "    [ AS ASSIGNMENT | AS IMPLICIT ]"
7737
7738#~ msgid ""
7739#~ "CREATE AGGREGATE name ( input_data_type [ , ... ] ) (\n"
7740#~ "    SFUNC = sfunc,\n"
7741#~ "    STYPE = state_data_type\n"
7742#~ "    [ , FINALFUNC = ffunc ]\n"
7743#~ "    [ , INITCOND = initial_condition ]\n"
7744#~ "    [ , SORTOP = sort_operator ]\n"
7745#~ ")\n"
7746#~ "\n"
7747#~ "or the old syntax\n"
7748#~ "\n"
7749#~ "CREATE AGGREGATE name (\n"
7750#~ "    BASETYPE = base_type,\n"
7751#~ "    SFUNC = sfunc,\n"
7752#~ "    STYPE = state_data_type\n"
7753#~ "    [ , FINALFUNC = ffunc ]\n"
7754#~ "    [ , INITCOND = initial_condition ]\n"
7755#~ "    [ , SORTOP = sort_operator ]\n"
7756#~ ")"
7757#~ msgstr ""
7758#~ "CREATE AGGREGATE name ( input_data_type [ , ... ] ) (\n"
7759#~ "    SFUNC = sfunc,\n"
7760#~ "    STYPE = state_data_type\n"
7761#~ "    [ , FINALFUNC = ffunc ]\n"
7762#~ "    [ , INITCOND = initial_condition ]\n"
7763#~ "    [ , SORTOP = sort_operator ]\n"
7764#~ ")\n"
7765#~ "\n"
7766#~ "or the old syntax\n"
7767#~ "\n"
7768#~ "CREATE AGGREGATE name (\n"
7769#~ "    BASETYPE = base_type,\n"
7770#~ "    SFUNC = sfunc,\n"
7771#~ "    STYPE = state_data_type\n"
7772#~ "    [ , FINALFUNC = ffunc ]\n"
7773#~ "    [ , INITCOND = initial_condition ]\n"
7774#~ "    [ , SORTOP = sort_operator ]\n"
7775#~ ")"
7776
7777#~ msgid ""
7778#~ "COPY tablename [ ( column [, ...] ) ]\n"
7779#~ "    FROM { 'filename' | STDIN }\n"
7780#~ "    [ [ WITH ] \n"
7781#~ "          [ BINARY ]\n"
7782#~ "          [ OIDS ]\n"
7783#~ "          [ DELIMITER [ AS ] 'delimiter' ]\n"
7784#~ "          [ NULL [ AS ] 'null string' ]\n"
7785#~ "          [ CSV [ HEADER ]\n"
7786#~ "                [ QUOTE [ AS ] 'quote' ] \n"
7787#~ "                [ ESCAPE [ AS ] 'escape' ]\n"
7788#~ "                [ FORCE NOT NULL column [, ...] ]\n"
7789#~ "\n"
7790#~ "COPY { tablename [ ( column [, ...] ) ] | ( query ) }\n"
7791#~ "    TO { 'filename' | STDOUT }\n"
7792#~ "    [ [ WITH ] \n"
7793#~ "          [ BINARY ]\n"
7794#~ "          [ OIDS ]\n"
7795#~ "          [ DELIMITER [ AS ] 'delimiter' ]\n"
7796#~ "          [ NULL [ AS ] 'null string' ]\n"
7797#~ "          [ CSV [ HEADER ]\n"
7798#~ "                [ QUOTE [ AS ] 'quote' ] \n"
7799#~ "                [ ESCAPE [ AS ] 'escape' ]\n"
7800#~ "                [ FORCE QUOTE column [, ...] ]"
7801#~ msgstr ""
7802#~ "COPY tablo adı [ ( kolon [, ...] ) ]\n"
7803#~ "    FROM { 'dosya adı' | STDIN }\n"
7804#~ "    [ [ WITH ] \n"
7805#~ "          [ BINARY ]\n"
7806#~ "          [ OIDS ]\n"
7807#~ "          [ DELIMITER [ AS ] 'delimiter' ]\n"
7808#~ "          [ NULL [ AS ] 'null string' ]\n"
7809#~ "          [ CSV [ HEADER ]\n"
7810#~ "                [ QUOTE [ AS ] 'quote' ] \n"
7811#~ "                [ ESCAPE [ AS ] 'escape' ]\n"
7812#~ "                [ FORCE NOT NULL column [, ...] ]\n"
7813#~ "\n"
7814#~ "COPY { tablo adı [ ( kolon [, ...] ) ] | ( sorgu ) }\n"
7815#~ "    TO { 'dosya adı' | STDOUT }\n"
7816#~ "    [ [ WITH ] \n"
7817#~ "          [ BINARY ]\n"
7818#~ "          [ OIDS ]\n"
7819#~ "          [ DELIMITER [ AS ] 'delimiter' ]\n"
7820#~ "          [ NULL [ AS ] 'null string' ]\n"
7821#~ "          [ CSV [ HEADER ]\n"
7822#~ "                [ QUOTE [ AS ] 'quote' ] \n"
7823#~ "                [ ESCAPE [ AS ] 'escape' ]\n"
7824#~ "                [ FORCE QUOTE column [, ...] ]"
7825
7826#~ msgid "COMMIT PREPARED transaction_id"
7827#~ msgstr "COMMIT PREPARED transaction_id"
7828
7829#~ msgid "COMMIT [ WORK | TRANSACTION ]"
7830#~ msgstr "COMMIT [ WORK | TRANSACTION ]"
7831
7832#~ msgid ""
7833#~ "COMMENT ON\n"
7834#~ "{\n"
7835#~ "  TABLE object_name |\n"
7836#~ "  COLUMN table_name.column_name |\n"
7837#~ "  AGGREGATE agg_name (agg_type [, ...] ) |\n"
7838#~ "  CAST (sourcetype AS targettype) |\n"
7839#~ "  CONSTRAINT constraint_name ON table_name |\n"
7840#~ "  CONVERSION object_name |\n"
7841#~ "  DATABASE object_name |\n"
7842#~ "  DOMAIN object_name |\n"
7843#~ "  FUNCTION func_name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] ) |\n"
7844#~ "  INDEX object_name |\n"
7845#~ "  LARGE OBJECT large_object_oid |\n"
7846#~ "  OPERATOR op (leftoperand_type, rightoperand_type) |\n"
7847#~ "  OPERATOR CLASS object_name USING index_method |\n"
7848#~ "  OPERATOR FAMILY object_name USING index_method |\n"
7849#~ "  [ PROCEDURAL ] LANGUAGE object_name |\n"
7850#~ "  ROLE object_name |\n"
7851#~ "  RULE rule_name ON table_name |\n"
7852#~ "  SCHEMA object_name |\n"
7853#~ "  SEQUENCE object_name |\n"
7854#~ "  TABLESPACE object_name |\n"
7855#~ "  TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION object_name |\n"
7856#~ "  TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY object_name |\n"
7857#~ "  TEXT SEARCH PARSER object_name |\n"
7858#~ "  TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE object_name |\n"
7859#~ "  TRIGGER trigger_name ON table_name |\n"
7860#~ "  TYPE object_name |\n"
7861#~ "  VIEW object_name\n"
7862#~ "} IS 'text'"
7863#~ msgstr ""
7864#~ "COMMENT ON\n"
7865#~ "{\n"
7866#~ "  TABLE nesne_ado |\n"
7867#~ "  COLUMN tablo_adı.kolon_adı |\n"
7868#~ "  AGGREGATE agg_name (agg_type [, ...] ) |\n"
7869#~ "  CAST (sourcetype AS targettype) |\n"
7870#~ "  CONSTRAINT constraint_name ON table_name |\n"
7871#~ "  CONVERSION nesne_adı |\n"
7872#~ "  DATABASE nesne_adı |\n"
7873#~ "  DOMAIN nesne_adı |\n"
7874#~ "  FUNCTION fonksiyon_adı ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] ) |\n"
7875#~ "  INDEX nesne_adı |\n"
7876#~ "  LARGE OBJECT large_object_oid |\n"
7877#~ "  OPERATOR op (leftoperand_type, rightoperand_type) |\n"
7878#~ "  OPERATOR CLASS nesne_adı USING index_yöntemi |\n"
7879#~ "  OPERATOR FAMILY nesne_adı USING index_yöntemi |\n"
7880#~ "  [ PROCEDURAL ] LANGUAGE nesne_adı |\n"
7881#~ "  ROLE nesne_adı |\n"
7882#~ "  RULE kural_adı ON tablo_adı |\n"
7883#~ "  SCHEMA nesne_adı |\n"
7884#~ "  SEQUENCE nesne_adı |\n"
7885#~ "  TABLESPACE nesne_adı |\n"
7886#~ "  TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION nesne_adı |\n"
7887#~ "  TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY nesne_adı |\n"
7888#~ "  TEXT SEARCH PARSER nesne_adı |\n"
7889#~ "  TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE nesne_adı |\n"
7890#~ "  TRIGGER tetikleyici_adı ON table_name |\n"
7891#~ "  TYPE nesne_adı |\n"
7892#~ "  VIEW nesne_adı\n"
7893#~ "} IS 'text'"

7908#~ msgid ""
7909#~ "BEGIN [ WORK | TRANSACTION ] [ transaction_mode [, ...] ]\n"
7910#~ "\n"
7911#~ "where transaction_mode is one of:\n"
7912#~ "\n"
7913#~ "    ISOLATION LEVEL { SERIALIZABLE | REPEATABLE READ | READ COMMITTED | READ UNCOMMITTED }\n"
7914#~ "    READ WRITE | READ ONLY"
7915#~ msgstr ""
7916#~ "BEGIN [ WORK | TRANSACTION ] [ transaction_modu [, ...] ]\n"
7917#~ "\n"
7918#~ "transaction_modu aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7919#~ "\n"
7920#~ "    ISOLATION LEVEL { SERIALIZABLE | REPEATABLE READ | READ COMMITTED | READ UNCOMMITTED }\n"
7921#~ "    READ WRITE | READ ONLY"

7930#~ "ALTER VIEW name RENAME TO new_name\n"
7931#~ "ALTER VIEW name SET SCHEMA new_schema"

7936#~ "ALTER VIEW ad RENAME TO yeni adı\n"
7937#~ "ALTER VIEW ad SET SCHEMA yeni şema"

7941#~ "    SERVER servername\n"
7942#~ "    OPTIONS ( [ ADD | SET | DROP ] option ['value'] [, ... ] )"
7943#~ msgstr ""

7945#~ "    SERVER sunucu adı\n"
7946#~ "    OPTIONS ( [ ADD | SET | DROP ] seçenek ['değer'] [, ... ] )"
7947
7948#~ msgid ""
7949#~ "ALTER USER name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
7950#~ "\n"
7951#~ "where option can be:\n"
7952#~ "    \n"
7953#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7954#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7955#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7956#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7957#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7958#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7959#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
7960#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7961#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7962#~ "\n"
7963#~ "ALTER USER name RENAME TO newname\n"
7964#~ "\n"
7965#~ "ALTER USER name SET configuration_parameter { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
7966#~ "ALTER USER name SET configuration_parameter FROM CURRENT\n"
7967#~ "ALTER USER name RESET configuration_parameter\n"
7968#~ "ALTER USER name RESET ALL"
7969#~ msgstr ""
7970#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı [ [ WITH ] seçenek [ ... ] ]\n"
7971#~ "\n"
7972#~ "seçenek aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
7973#~ "    \n"
7974#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
7975#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
7976#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
7977#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
7978#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
7979#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
7980#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT bağlantı_sayısı_sınırı\n"
7981#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
7982#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
7983#~ "\n"
7984#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı RENAME TO yeni_adı\n"
7985#~ "\n"
7986#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı SET yapılandırma_parametresi { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
7987#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı SET yapılandırma_parametresi FROM CURRENT\n"
7988#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı RESET yapılandırma_parametresi\n"
7989#~ "ALTER USER kullanıcı_adı RESET ALL"

7998#~ "ALTER TYPE ad SET SCHEMA yeni şema"

8022#~ msgid ""
8023#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8024#~ "    ADD MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] WITH dictionary_name [, ... ]\n"
8025#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8026#~ "    ALTER MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] WITH dictionary_name [, ... ]\n"
8027#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8028#~ "    ALTER MAPPING REPLACE old_dictionary WITH new_dictionary\n"
8029#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8030#~ "    ALTER MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] REPLACE old_dictionary WITH new_dictionary\n"
8031#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8032#~ "    DROP MAPPING [ IF EXISTS ] FOR token_type [, ... ]\n"
8033#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name RENAME TO newname\n"
8034#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name OWNER TO newowner"
8035#~ msgstr ""
8036#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8037#~ "    ADD MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] WITH dictionary_name [, ... ]\n"
8038#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8039#~ "    ALTER MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] WITH dictionary_name [, ... ]\n"
8040#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8041#~ "    ALTER MAPPING REPLACE old_dictionary WITH new_dictionary\n"
8042#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8043#~ "    ALTER MAPPING FOR token_type [, ... ] REPLACE old_dictionary WITH new_dictionary\n"
8044#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name\n"
8045#~ "    DROP MAPPING [ IF EXISTS ] FOR token_type [, ... ]\n"
8046#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name RENAME TO newname\n"
8047#~ "ALTER TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION name OWNER TO newowner"

8049#~ msgid ""
8050#~ "ALTER TABLESPACE name RENAME TO newname\n"
8051#~ "ALTER TABLESPACE name OWNER TO newowner"
8052#~ msgstr ""
8053#~ "ALTER TABLESPACE tablespace_adı RENAME TO yeni_ad\n"
8054#~ "ALTER TABLESPACE tablespace_adı OWNER TO yeni_sahip"
8055
8056#~ msgid ""
8057#~ "ALTER TABLE [ ONLY ] name [ * ]\n"
8058#~ "    action [, ... ]\n"
8059#~ "ALTER TABLE [ ONLY ] name [ * ]\n"
8060#~ "    RENAME [ COLUMN ] column TO new_column\n"
8061#~ "ALTER TABLE name\n"
8062#~ "    RENAME TO new_name\n"
8063#~ "ALTER TABLE name\n"
8064#~ "    SET SCHEMA new_schema\n"
8065#~ "\n"
8066#~ "where action is one of:\n"
8067#~ "\n"
8068#~ "    ADD [ COLUMN ] column type [ column_constraint [ ... ] ]\n"
8069#~ "    DROP [ COLUMN ] column [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n"
8070#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column [ SET DATA ] TYPE type [ USING expression ]\n"
8071#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column SET DEFAULT expression\n"
8072#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column DROP DEFAULT\n"
8073#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column { SET | DROP } NOT NULL\n"
8074#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column SET STATISTICS integer\n"
8075#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] column SET STORAGE { PLAIN | EXTERNAL | EXTENDED | MAIN }\n"
8076#~ "    ADD table_constraint\n"
8077#~ "    DROP CONSTRAINT constraint_name [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n"
8078#~ "    DISABLE TRIGGER [ trigger_name | ALL | USER ]\n"
8079#~ "    ENABLE TRIGGER [ trigger_name | ALL | USER ]\n"
8080#~ "    ENABLE REPLICA TRIGGER trigger_name\n"
8081#~ "    ENABLE ALWAYS TRIGGER trigger_name\n"
8082#~ "    DISABLE RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8083#~ "    ENABLE RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8084#~ "    ENABLE REPLICA RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8085#~ "    ENABLE ALWAYS RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8086#~ "    CLUSTER ON index_name\n"
8087#~ "    SET WITHOUT CLUSTER\n"
8088#~ "    SET WITH OIDS\n"
8089#~ "    SET WITHOUT OIDS\n"
8090#~ "    SET ( storage_parameter = value [, ... ] )\n"
8091#~ "    RESET ( storage_parameter [, ... ] )\n"
8092#~ "    INHERIT parent_table\n"
8093#~ "    NO INHERIT parent_table\n"
8094#~ "    OWNER TO new_owner\n"
8095#~ "    SET TABLESPACE new_tablespace"
8096#~ msgstr ""
8097#~ "ALTER TABLE [ ONLY ] ad [ * ]\n"
8098#~ "    action [, ... ]\n"
8099#~ "ALTER TABLE [ ONLY ] ad [ * ]\n"
8100#~ "    RENAME [ COLUMN ] kolon TO yeni kolon\n"
8101#~ "ALTER TABLE ad\n"
8102#~ "    RENAME TO yeni ad\n"
8103#~ "ALTER TABLE ad\n"
8104#~ "    SET SCHEMA yeni şema\n"
8105#~ "\n"
8106#~ "action aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
8107#~ "\n"
8108#~ "    ADD [ COLUMN ] kolon kolon_tipi [ kolon kısıtlaması [ ... ] ]\n"
8109#~ "    DROP [ COLUMN ] kolon [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n"
8110#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon [ SET DATA ] TYPE type [ USING ifade ]\n"
8111#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon SET DEFAULT ifade\n"
8112#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon DROP DEFAULT\n"
8113#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon { SET | DROP } NOT NULL\n"
8114#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon SET STATISTICS tamsayı\n"
8115#~ "    ALTER [ COLUMN ] kolon SET STORAGE { PLAIN | EXTERNAL | EXTENDED | MAIN }\n"
8116#~ "    ADD tablo kısıtlaması\n"
8117#~ "    DROP CONSTRAINT kısıtlama adı [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n"
8118#~ "    DISABLE TRIGGER [ trigger adı | ALL | USER ]\n"
8119#~ "    ENABLE TRIGGER[ trigger adı | ALL | USER ]\n"
8120#~ "    ENABLE REPLICA TRIGGER trigger adı\n"
8121#~ "    ENABLE ALWAYS TRIGGER trigger adı\n"
8122#~ "    DISABLE RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8123#~ "    ENABLE RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8124#~ "    ENABLE REPLICA RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8125#~ "    ENABLE ALWAYS RULE rewrite_rule_name\n"
8126#~ "    CLUSTER ON index adı\n"
8127#~ "    SET WITHOUT CLUSTER\n"
8128#~ "    SET WITH OIDS\n"
8129#~ "    SET WITHOUT OIDS\n"
8130#~ "    SET ( storage_parameter = value [, ... ] )\n"
8131#~ "    RESET ( storage_parameter [, ... ] )\n"
8132#~ "    INHERIT üst tablo\n"
8133#~ "    NO INHERIT üst tablo\n"
8134#~ "    OWNER TO yeni sahibi\n"
8135#~ "    SET TABLESPACE yeni tablespace"
8136
8137#~ msgid ""
8138#~ "ALTER SERVER servername [ VERSION 'newversion' ]\n"
8139#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( [ ADD | SET | DROP ] option ['value'] [, ... ] ) ]\n"
8140#~ "ALTER SERVER servername OWNER TO new_owner"
8141#~ msgstr ""

8143#~ "    [ OPTIONS ( [ ADD | SET | DROP ] seçenek ['değer'] [, ... ] ) ]\n"
8144#~ "ALTER SERVER sunucu adı OWNER TO yeni sahibi"
8145
8146#~ msgid ""
8147#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE name [ INCREMENT [ BY ] increment ]\n"
8148#~ "    [ MINVALUE minvalue | NO MINVALUE ] [ MAXVALUE maxvalue | NO MAXVALUE ]\n"
8149#~ "    [ START [ WITH ] start ]\n"
8150#~ "    [ RESTART [ [ WITH ] restart ] ]\n"
8151#~ "    [ CACHE cache ] [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]\n"
8152#~ "    [ OWNED BY { table.column | NONE } ]\n"
8153#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE name OWNER TO new_owner\n"
8154#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE name RENAME TO new_name\n"
8155#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE name SET SCHEMA new_schema"
8156#~ msgstr ""
8157#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE ad [ INCREMENT [ BY ] arttırma miktarı ]\n"
8158#~ "    [ MINVALUE en az değer | NO MINVALUE ] [ MAXVALUE üst değer | NO MAXVALUE ]\n"
8159#~ "    [ START [ WITH ] başlama sayısı ]\n"
8160#~ "    [ RESTART [ [ WITH ] yeniden başlama sayısı ] ]\n"
8161#~ "    [ CACHE önbellek ] [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]\n"
8162#~ "    [ OWNED BY { tablo.kolon | NONE } ]\n"
8163#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE ad OWNER TO yeni sahibir\n"
8164#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE ad RENAME TO yeni adı\n"
8165#~ "ALTER SEQUENCE namade SET SCHEMA yeni şeması"
8166
8167#~ msgid ""
8168#~ "ALTER SCHEMA name RENAME TO newname\n"
8169#~ "ALTER SCHEMA name OWNER TO newowner"
8170#~ msgstr ""
8171#~ "ALTER SCHEMA şema_adı RENAME TO yeni_ad\n"
8172#~ "ALTER SCHEMA şema_adı OWNER TO yeni_sahip"
8173
8174#~ msgid ""
8175#~ "ALTER ROLE name [ [ WITH ] option [ ... ] ]\n"
8176#~ "\n"
8177#~ "where option can be:\n"
8178#~ "    \n"
8179#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
8180#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
8181#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
8182#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
8183#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
8184#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
8185#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT connlimit\n"
8186#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
8187#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
8188#~ "\n"
8189#~ "ALTER ROLE name RENAME TO newname\n"
8190#~ "\n"
8191#~ "ALTER ROLE name SET configuration_parameter { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
8192#~ "ALTER ROLE name SET configuration_parameter FROM CURRENT\n"
8193#~ "ALTER ROLE name RESET configuration_parameter\n"
8194#~ "ALTER ROLE name RESET ALL"
8195#~ msgstr ""
8196#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı [ [ WITH ] seçenek [ ... ] ]\n"
8197#~ "\n"
8198#~ "seçenek aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
8199#~ "    \n"
8200#~ "      SUPERUSER | NOSUPERUSER\n"
8201#~ "    | CREATEDB | NOCREATEDB\n"
8202#~ "    | CREATEROLE | NOCREATEROLE\n"
8203#~ "    | CREATEUSER | NOCREATEUSER\n"
8204#~ "    | INHERIT | NOINHERIT\n"
8205#~ "    | LOGIN | NOLOGIN\n"
8206#~ "    | CONNECTION LIMIT bağlantı_sayısı_sınırı\n"
8207#~ "    | [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD 'password'\n"
8208#~ "    | VALID UNTIL 'timestamp' \n"
8209#~ "\n"
8210#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı RENAME TO yeni_adı\n"
8211#~ "\n"
8212#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı SET yapılandırma_parametresi { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
8213#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı SET yapılandırma_parametresi FROM CURRENT\n"
8214#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı RESET yapılandırma_parametresi\n"
8215#~ "ALTER ROLE rol_adı RESET ALL"
8216
8217#~ msgid ""
8218#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method ADD\n"
8219#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number operator_name ( op_type, op_type )\n"
8220#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number [ ( op_type [ , op_type ] ) ] funcname ( argument_type [, ...] )\n"
8221#~ "  } [, ... ]\n"
8222#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method DROP\n"
8223#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number ( op_type [ , op_type ] )\n"
8224#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number ( op_type [ , op_type ] )\n"
8225#~ "  } [, ... ]\n"
8226#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method RENAME TO newname\n"
8227#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY name USING index_method OWNER TO newowner"
8228#~ msgstr ""
8229#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY adı USING index_methodu ADD\n"
8230#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number operator_name ( op_type, op_type )\n"
8231#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number [ ( op_type [ , op_type ] ) ] funcname ( argument_type [, ...] )\n"
8232#~ "  } [, ... ]\n"
8233#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY ad USING index_methodu DROP\n"
8234#~ "  {  OPERATOR strategy_number ( op_type [ , op_type ] )\n"
8235#~ "   | FUNCTION support_number ( op_type [ , op_type ] )\n"
8236#~ "  } [, ... ]\n"
8237#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY ad USING index_methodu RENAME TO yeni ad\n"
8238#~ "ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY ad USING index_methodu OWNER TO yeni sahibi"

8279#~ msgid ""
8280#~ "ALTER FUNCTION name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8281#~ "    action [ ... ] [ RESTRICT ]\n"
8282#~ "ALTER FUNCTION name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8283#~ "    RENAME TO new_name\n"
8284#~ "ALTER FUNCTION name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8285#~ "    OWNER TO new_owner\n"
8286#~ "ALTER FUNCTION name ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8287#~ "    SET SCHEMA new_schema\n"
8288#~ "\n"
8289#~ "where action is one of:\n"
8290#~ "\n"
8291#~ "    CALLED ON NULL INPUT | RETURNS NULL ON NULL INPUT | STRICT\n"
8292#~ "    IMMUTABLE | STABLE | VOLATILE\n"
8293#~ "    [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY INVOKER | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY DEFINER\n"
8294#~ "    COST execution_cost\n"
8295#~ "    ROWS result_rows\n"
8296#~ "    SET configuration_parameter { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
8297#~ "    SET configuration_parameter FROM CURRENT\n"
8298#~ "    RESET configuration_parameter\n"
8299#~ "    RESET ALL"
8300#~ msgstr ""
8301#~ "ALTER FUNCTION fonksiyon_adı ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8302#~ "    işlem [ ... ] [ RESTRICT ]\n"
8303#~ "ALTER FUNCTION fonksiyon_adı ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8304#~ "    RENAME TO yeni_adı\n"
8305#~ "ALTER FUNCTION fonksiyon_adı ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8306#~ "    OWNER TO yeni_sahibi\n"
8307#~ "ALTER FUNCTION fonksiyon_adı ( [ [ argmode ] [ argname ] argtype [, ...] ] )\n"
8308#~ "    SET SCHEMA yeni_şema\n"
8309#~ "\n"
8310#~ "işlem aşağıdakilerden birisi olabilir:\n"
8311#~ "\n"
8312#~ "    CALLED ON NULL INPUT | RETURNS NULL ON NULL INPUT | STRICT\n"
8313#~ "    IMMUTABLE | STABLE | VOLATILE\n"
8314#~ "    [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY INVOKER | [ EXTERNAL ] SECURITY DEFINER\n"
8315#~ "    COST çalıştırma_maliyeti(execution cost)\n"
8316#~ "    ROWS result_rows\n"
8317#~ "    SET yapılandırma_parametresi { TO | = } { value | DEFAULT }\n"
8318#~ "    SET yapılandırma_parametresi FROM CURRENT\n"
8319#~ "    RESET yapılandırma_parametresi\n"
8320#~ "    RESET ALL"
8321

8366#~ "\n"
